text: Cluster Placement Groups @ tuastteamcaniatia @ ssancanc e Can't span AZs - ONE AZ ONLY - locked when launching first instance e Can span VPC peers - but impacts performance * Requires a supported instance type ¢ Use the same type of instance (not mandatory) ¢ Launch at the same time (not mandatory ... very recommended) - ¢ 10Gbps single stream performance e Use cases : Performance, fast speeds, low latency
